description_long: This is a classic yellow convertible car with a sleek, elongated body and a low profile, reminiscent of American muscle cars from the late 1960s. The exterior features a smooth, glossy yellow paint with subtle orange pinstripes running along the hood and trunk. The front end is characterized by a wide grille, dual round headlights, and a simple chrome bumper. The interior is open, revealing two rows of black seats and a dashboard with a steering wheel on the left side. The wheels are dark with a five-spoke design and red accents at the center. The car lacks a visible roof, emphasizing its convertible nature and sporty appeal.
description: A classic yellow convertible car with a sleek, low body, open black interior, and retro styling reminiscent of late 1960s American muscle cars.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, dual round headlights, and smooth yellow hood with orange pinstripes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, open cabin, black seats, and five-spoke wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the trunk with orange pinstripes, round taillights, and open seating area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open interior, yellow body, and detailed wheels.
